que: What is the role of main() in a Flutter app?
options: It is the app entry point
Attaches the root widget to the screen

que: Which widget is commonly passed to runApp()?
options: A root app widget like MaterialApp
Before async setup that needs Flutter bindings

que: What usually happens after runApp() is called?
options: The root widget builds the rest of the widget tree
The app stops listening for input
